subcodes.first_line: This Book, verily, speaketh of itself and proclaimeth, heareth and answereth. Indeed, He is the All-Speaking, the All-Hearing. We have made manifest the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب بنفسه ینطق و یقول یسمع و یجیب انه لهو الناطق السمیع قد اظهرنا الامر
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @living waters; water of life, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
